The implementation already has the full Game of Life algorithm. This test will likely pass immediately.

The test should verify the blinker oscillator pattern from the spec:
- Gen 0: [[0, 0], [0, 1], [0, 2]] (vertical line)
- Gen 1: [[-1, 1], [0, 1], [1, 1]] (horizontal line)
- Gen 2: [[0, 0], [0, 1], [0, 2]] (back to vertical - same as Gen 0)
- Check that nextGeneration(gen0) equals gen1 (sorted)
- Check that nextGeneration(gen1) equals gen0 (sorted) — or gen2 which is same as gen0

Use sorted comparison since order may differ.

IMPORTANT: Only activate test 8 ("should oscillate a blinker pattern"). Do NOT modify test 7 — another agent handles that. READ the file first, then only change the test 8 line.

Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or
Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction
lines into one.
